use_cases: Account deletion with built-in countdown timer for accidental click protection
Data removal confirmation in admin panels requiring user acknowledgment
Destructive action safeguards in settings pages
Cascading deletion workflows with undo capability
Compliance-required waiting periods before permanent data removal
ai_summary: A smart delete button component that prevents accidental deletions by featuring a 10-second countdown timer with smooth morphing animations between states. Uses Framer Motion for fluid transitions and includes a cancel option to revert the action. Ideal for safety-critical deletion operations like account removal or data purging in any application requiring confirmation workflows.
